_meta.purpose: Overall system understanding — architecture, stack, deployment, constraints, maturity

identity.description: Standalone SaaS QR event ticketing platform for organizers. Buyers request tickets through a public event page, organizers approve, tickets are delivered via client dashboard link, scanned at the door.
identity.isolation_rule: Standalone from Connsura. No shared runtime, DB, or containers. Shared only: SES, Zoho mail, root domain ownership.

frontend.build_output: static SPA served by Docker container on port 4173

infrastructure.proxy: nginx (reverse proxy, WebSocket upgrade, OG crawler UA routing)
infrastructure.ci_cd: GitHub Actions CI with backend/frontend jobs. Backend job provisions Postgres and enforces required integration gates (scan + request/approval + cancellation + organizer-recovery) on PR/push(main).
infrastructure.backup: daily cron at 02:00 UTC → pg_dump → S3

implemented: express-rate-limit (4 limiters: scan, OTP x2, support)
failed-scan IP block (in-memory Map, 20 attempts → 15min block)
Cloudflare Turnstile CAPTCHA on public forms
Admin protected by x-admin-key header/query param
S3 attachment access via authorization-checked routes
Zod request validation middleware on public/non-admin routes (params/query/body)
missing: Redis-backed rate limiting (in-memory resets on restart)
No dependency CVE scanning in CI
Rate limiting not per-user/session, only per-IP
Admin key is a simple shared string (no rotation policy)
fixed_2026_04_06: Recovery/contact OTP endpoints now have rate limiting (BUG-012, commit fde05c0)
npm CVEs resolved — 0 vulnerabilities in backend and frontend (BUG-014, commit fde05c0)
Chat attachments now stored in persistent Docker volume (BUG-011, commit fb1861c)

implemented: AdminAuditLog DB table for admin actions
Sentry backend error tracking with Express error-handler integration and event scrubbing
missing: APM (no response time, DB query monitoring)
Uptime monitoring (no external health check service)
Alerting (no PagerDuty, email alerts, Slack alerts)
Analytics (no funnel data, no user behavior tracking)

organizer_request_review.approach: Deterministic explainable risk signals (rules-based, no model inference)

organizer_invoicing.trigger_policy: Scheduler checks active non-demo events in the next 24h window and generates PRE_EVENT_24H invoice snapshot
organizer_invoicing.manual_action: Admin can mark invoice as PAID or record incremental partial payments with optional short payment note.
organizer_invoicing.automatic_transition: Scheduler marks SENT/PARTIAL_SEND_FAILED invoices as OVERDUE when dueAt has passed and invoice is not PAID

settlement_model.enforcement: Organizer create-new event route is blocked when a POST_EVENT_FINAL invoice is OVERDUE and unpaid.

organizer_invoicing.instruction_source: AdminCurrencyPaymentInstruction per currency (editable in Admin Settings page)
organizer_invoicing.safe_failure_behavior: If instruction missing for invoice currency, invoice is marked BLOCKED_MISSING_INSTRUCTION and not sent.
organizer_invoicing.admin_visibility: Admin event detail endpoint and page show latest invoice status, paidAt/paymentNote, amounts, snapshot instruction, and channel errors.

test_coverage.note: Backend integration suites now cover scan flow, ticket request/approval flow, organizer ticket cancellation flow, organizer recovery OTP/code flow, and organizer invoicing including settlement scenarios (paid-early delta billing, unpaid full final balance, partial payment math, no-final-invoice when no remaining, final-overdue create-new block, and unblock on payment).

environment_variables.secrets_management: plain .env files — no Vault, no SSM Parameter Store

known_constraints: Single-instance deployment (in-memory state breaks horizontal scaling)
No staging environment (documented as placeholder only)
Ticket design locked after first generation per event
PDF/email delivery methods removed — public event page is the ONLY delivery method
organizerAccessCode is case-sensitive in Postgres (was a bug source)
